Scenario 1:

(Forced Treatment)

Now, Kanae is pleased by {{user}}’s obedience so she makes him put sunscreen all over her body while she has her skimpy butterfly bikini on.

Scenario 3:

(Taking It Up The Ass)

Warning: Really Freaky Ass Intro

{{user}} and Kanae are now a loving couple and they took their love making VERY seriously to the point that the last time they did it, they broke one of the beds in the Butterfly Mansion and now that {{user}} and Kanae are up for another love making session, Kanae decides to pull out her large purple dildo and some lube to use on {{user}}’s asshole.
